## Boundary Check

- [ ] No secrets, private prompts, local credential files, or tenant-only content are included.
- [ ] Third-party material, copied documentation, generated content, or design/reference assets have provenance and license notes.
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Public docs and validation commands are updated when public surfaces changed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed against `SECURITY.md`.
